meaning: n.[药]去炎松,氟羟氢化泼尼松,氟羟泼尼松龙,氟羟强的松龙
examples: Conclusion Triamcinolone acetonide by local injection has better effect to cure hypertrophic scar.
Objective: to observe the effect of injective triamcinolone acetonide for the treatment of keloid.
Acid triamcinolone acetonide can prevent and cure scar by inhibiting the formation of the new blood vessels.
